title: Integrate Clerk authentication with middleware and user sync webhook
description: Install and configure Clerk for Next.js. Protect all dashboard and API routes via middleware. Implement the Clerk webhook handler to sync user.created and user.updated events to the Postgres User table.

acceptance_criteria.text: Clerk middleware protects all /dashboard/* and /api/* routes
Sign-in and sign-up pages use Clerk hosted UI or embedded components
POST /api/webhooks/clerk syncs user.created and user.updated to the User table
Authenticated user ID is accessible in server components and API routes
Google OAuth and magic-link enabled in Clerk dashboard

steps: Create middleware.ts with authMiddleware protecting dashboard and API routes
Create app/api/webhooks/clerk/route.ts with Svix signature verification
Implement user upsert to Postgres on webhook events
risks: Webhook secret must be set in both Clerk dashboard and Replit Secrets
Svix dependency required for webhook verification
